query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_puzzles FROM puzzles; SELECT COUNT(*) as puzzles_with_fen FROM puzzles WHERE fen IS NOT NULL AND fen != ''; SELECT COUNT(*) as puzzles_without_fen FROM puzzles WHERE fen IS NULL OR fen = ''; SELECT COUNT(*) as puzzles_without_opening FROM puzzles WHERE opening IS NULL OR opening = '';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total_puzzles FROM puzzles; SELECT COUNT(*) as puzzles_with_fen FROM puzzles WHERE fen IS NOT NULL AND fen != ''; SELECT COUNT(*) as puzzles_without_fen FROM puzzles WHERE fen IS NULL OR fen = ''; SELECT COUNT(*) as puzzles_without_opening FROM puzzles WHERE opening IS NULL OR opening = '';
